parameters.query: SELECT * FROM sunfra_unified_reminders WHERE status = 'pending' AND trigger_time <= CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+05:30');

SELECT sender, group_name, category, notes, processed_time AS timestamp FROM sunfra_processed_data WHERE DATE(processed_time) = DATE(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+05:30')) UNION SELECT sender, group_name, 'raw' AS category, raw_text AS notes, timestamp FROM sunfra_raw_messages WHERE DATE(timestamp) = DATE(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+05:30'));

UPDATE sunfra_unified_reminders SET trigger_time = '{{ $('Check Submissions').first().json.next_trigger_time }}', status = '{{ $('Check Submissions').first().json.new_status }}' WHERE id = {{ $('Check Submissions').first().json.id }};
